pages.text:
INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

I, Dr.

Upadit Pachariyangkun,

Minister of Foreign Affairs

of Thailand, do hereby declare that Thailand accedes to the Convention

Instituting an International Sericultural Commission, open for signature at the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the French Republic from the

Ist July 1957 to the 31st December 1957, in accordance with the provisions of Article 25 of the said Convention.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have signed and sealed this Instrument of Accession at Bangkok this thirtieth

day of April in the year two

thousand five hundred and twenty-one of the Buddhist Era (corresponding to the year nineteen hundred and seventy-eight of the Christian Era).

n. inchnizangem.

(Dr. Upadit Pachariyangkun)

Minister of Foreign Affairs of Thailand
